product.name: LED Red Light Therapy Face Mask
product.category: Skincare Tech / At-Home Biohacking & Recovery Wellness

positioning.price_tier: Accessible DTC ($79–$249 gap between premium and budget)
positioning.target_customer: Women 28–48, interested in skincare routines, anti-aging, clean beauty. Follows beauty influencers. Spends on serums and SPF. Household income $60k+. Aspirational buyer who wants premium results without a $400 price tag.
positioning.marketing_angle: Your dermatologist's office — for $129. No appointment. No waiting room.
positioning.marketing_hook: Lead with before/after skin transformation. Lean into 'glass skin' and 'clean girl aesthetic' trends dominating TikTok beauty.
positioning.recommended_ad_creative: 15-second TikTok/Reel. Open on a woman sitting in dim bathroom lighting, mask glowing red, text overlay: 'Spent $800 on facials last year. Then I found this.' Cut to close-up of glowing mask. Cut to 30-day skin comparison. End with product and price. UGC-style, not polished.

tiktok.notable: Celebrity Lili Reinhart publicly praised the product

aliexpress_order_counts.product: 7 Colors LED Facial Mask with Neck
Sgrow Red Light Therapy Face Mask (Alibaba)

premium_brands.name: HigherDOSE Red Light Face Mask
premium_brands.notes: Cordless, near-infrared + red, strong brand halo

competitors.market_gap: The $79–$249 branded DTC tier is wide open. Premium brands anchor at $300–$700. Budget brands own Amazon with low-trust unbranded products. No dominant monopoly in the accessible tier.
competitor_weaknesses: No education-first content — spec-heavy or lifestyle-only
No subscription or community play at accessible price tier

customer_complaints: No results — buyers lack proper usage instructions
Cheap materials / feels like a toy

seasonal_demand.jan_feb: PEAK — New Year resolution wave, highest search volume
seasonal_demand.mar_apr: STRONG — Spring reset mindset, pre-summer body focus
seasonal_demand.jun_aug: MODERATE — Slight drop but skincare stays strong
seasonal_demand.sep_oct: RISING — Back to routine after summer
seasonal_demand.nov_dec: VERY HIGH — Holiday gifting peak, highest ad competition/CPMs
seasonal_demand.launch_timing_note: Late Q1/early Q2 (NOW) is optimal — tail of highest organic demand with CPMs dropping from January peak

launch_strategy.fulfillment_recommendation: Zendrop US warehouse for 3–7 day delivery; CJDropshipping as backup

research_log.findings: Identified as #1 product in At-Home Recovery Wellness niche. Score: 9/10.
CJDropshipping confirmed as best supplier. Net margin 41.5%. Verdict: GO.
Amazon: 100K+ orders/month on #1 listing. Google: +309% 5yr growth. TikTok: 1.3B hashtag views. Market: $1.85B in 2026. VERIFIED WINNING PRODUCT.

research_log.action: Store build — 3 variations imported to Shopify
research_log.findings: LFM-STARTER ($69.99, 30.3% margin, SKU LFM-STARTER, Product ID 9357481607400), LFM-7C ($97.99, 31.8% margin, SKU LFM-7C, Product ID 9357481640168), LFM-PRO ($149.99, 34.3% margin, SKU LFM-PRO, Product ID 9357481705704). Collection 'LED Light Therapy' created (ID 444844376296). All DRAFT status.

research_log.action: Full product swap — 3 verified Alibaba LED mask suppliers
research_log.findings: Replaced all 3 products with verified Alibaba suppliers. ENTRY: Shenzhen Liyoutong (4.7★, 51 reviews, 3yr verified) white 7-color face+neck mask at $10.64, retail $37.99, SKU LFM-STARTER. MID: Shenzhen Perfect Idea Tech white 7-color high-density mask at $15.00, retail $52.99, SKU LFM-7C. PREMIUM: Shenzhen Mezans Tech (5.0★, 12 reviews, verified) black 3D silicone dual-zone 352-LED wireless mask at $33.00, retail $115.99, SKU LFM-PRO. All at 3.5x markup. Updated titles, descriptions, prices, and compare-at prices on Shopify. Deleted all old images, generated 15 new AI product images (5 per product: front, angle, detail, model, infographic) via Gemini 2.5 Flash Image. Generated 3 reference grids for Higgsfield UGC ads. Generated and uploaded hero banner to all 3 homepage hero sections. All products remain DRAFT.
